novel_features.name: Managed OAuth catalog access
novel_features.description: Bootstraps a private OAuth bundle and reuses or refreshes it for bearer-authenticated catalog reads.
novel_features.rationale: The provider-specific lifecycle removes manual bearer-token handling while retaining a bounded, read-only catalog path.

novel_features_built.name: Managed OAuth catalog access
novel_features_built.description: Bootstraps a private OAuth bundle and reuses or refreshes it for bearer-authenticated catalog reads.
novel_features_built.rationale: The provider-specific lifecycle removes manual bearer-token handling while retaining a bounded, read-only catalog path.
